## Description
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `ghost-tracker --threshold ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include full error traceback if available.

## Environment
- macOS version:
- Python version (`python3 --version`):
- Ghost Tracker version (`ghost-tracker --version`):
- Machine: MacBook Pro / MacBook Air / Mac mini / etc.
- Chip: Intel / Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3)

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
